utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey , you know what , if you are gonna do that , if you are gonna name him Joey , you should name him Chandler .

emotion_cause.span: 1_if you are gonna name him Joey , you should name him Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Chandler funny , sophisticated , and he is very loveable , once you get to know him .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh well , hey , Joey loveable too ! But the thing about Joey is , if you need him , he will be there .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , Chandler will be there for you too .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I mean , well , he might be a little late , but ... but , he will be there .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And he will bring you some cold soda , if want you need him for is that you are really hot .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What do you say ? What do you say ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , I , I like the idea of naming him after someone I love , and Joey and Chandler are great names .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: But , all right , I do not ... maybe I will just name him The Hulk .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I knew I should not have mentioned it ! That is what I wanted to name my kid !

emotion_cause.span: 11_I should not have mentioned it ! That is what I wanted to name my kid !
